metadata.description: An AI-Native methodology system: an architecture-tier skill that designs an AI-Native organization, plus six execution-tier skills that do the work the AI-native way, over a shared executable kernel layer (workflow-graph validator, council gate, essence linter). The executable companion to the AI Native Organization Methodology.

plugins.name: ai-native-architect
plugins.description: A seven-skill AI-Native system over one shared kernel. ARCHITECTURE TIER: ai-native-architect turns a business / startup / org-rebuild intent into a complete AI-Native Architecture Blueprint (scope gate, T1 = distribution of judgment x flow of context, a redrawn workflow graph, the four-layer substrate, conditional depth modules, kernel + future-trajectory). EXECUTION TIER (six surfaces, one kernel): ai-native-engineering, ai-native-design, ai-native-research, ai-native-learning, ai-native-innovation, and ai-native-org each DO the work of their surface the AI-native way — agents execute the abundant, humans hold the few irreducible judgment nodes. Grounded in the AI Native Organization Methodology.
